title: Phase 1: Relay subscription gating
description:
Relay currently allows all authenticated users to send and receive with no subscription check. The Store has is_subscribed() and subscription_expiry() but they are dead code — never consulted in ws.rs.

Required:
- Gate Send messages behind active subscription check
- Return Error{code:'subscription_required'} if not subscribed
- Allow receive (Deliver) without subscription so offline messages are retrievable
- Wire subscription_expires into AuthOk (already present, just needs real data)
- Dev/test override: REQUIRE_SUBSCRIPTION=false env var
